summary: Problem q5 asks the agent to define an O-adapted slice filtration relative to an incomplete transfer system (N_infty operad) and prove a geometric-fixed-point characterization of O-slice connectivity. While several foundational issues (well-definedness of chi^O, the N^T S^1 geometric fixed point formula, Lemma 2 hom-set bounds, and converse induction structure) have been resolved, the central characterization remains incomplete: the key 'geometric slices' lemma rests on an undefined notion plus an asserted equivalence, and a disputed divisibility claim plus a flawed Postnikov assembly of the geometric part block both directions of the proof.
problems: The 'geometric slices' lemma (lem:geom) relies on an undefined notion and an asserted but unproved key equivalence, undermining the core characterization.
Postnikov-tower assembly of the geometric part conflates spectrum-level and layer-level geometricity; i_K^* commuting with pi_j for layer geometricity is not justified.
Divisibility claim in the forward direction is contested — solver and critic disagree on whether it is correct, leaving the forward implication uncertain.
Homotopy Mackey functors of the geometric piece are not shown to be geometric, breaking the inductive bookkeeping.
Corollary cor:exact-slice uses the wrong vanishing threshold (r_H vs r_G) over proper subgroups H.
Necessity argument assumes closure of the connectivity property under localizing operations without proof.
Converse connectivity bookkeeping across induction is only summarized, not fully verified.
'Discrete slices' conclusion does not follow from the stated suspension containment.
highlights: Lemma 2 (lem:geom) key equivalence was rewritten to eliminate the circular/unproved equivalence, and the hom-set isomorphism upper bound was independently re-verified.
The formula Phi^G(N^T S^1) = S^{|T/G|} is now proved in full via a dedicated proposition.
Well-definedness of chi^O(H) as a genuine minimum (not infimum) has been established.
The Lemma 1 reduction to H=G was justified and the converse induction's base case and inductive step were completed and strengthened.

suggested_todos.title: Define the 'geometric slices' notion precisely and prove the asserted key equivalence in lem:geom
Repair the Postnikov-tower assembly of the geometric part by separating spectrum-level from layer-level geometricity and justifying i_K^* commuting with pi_j
Adjudicate the divisibility claim dispute between solver and critic with a self-contained computation or counterexample
Prove that homotopy Mackey functors of the geometric piece are geometric to close the inductive bookkeeping
Correct the vanishing threshold (r_H vs r_G) in cor:exact-slice and re-verify proper-subgroup vanishing
Establish closure of the connectivity property under localizing operations in the necessity argument
Expand the converse connectivity bookkeeping across induction into a fully written argument
Either reprove or remove the 'discrete slices' conclusion so it follows rigorously from suspension containment
